sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15357" key="a)ro/treuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρότρ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n15357.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ploughing</tr_>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">generation,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φύσεως ἀ. καινοῖς</foreign> Poet. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.49.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
